_comment: Data for the brainstorm-router (brainstorm_router.py). design_signals: lowercased substrings that mark a DESIGN / multi-option / 'which is better' intent in the submitted prompt. High-precision by design - add only phrases that strongly imply option-space exploration. These are GENERIC placeholder examples; replace them with your project's own phrases (any language works - the match is a plain lowercased substring test). min_len skips one-line acks. Edit here, not in code, so the hook source stays pure ASCII.
